root.help:
one — AI Native monorepo workspace orchestrator

USAGE
  one <command> [options]

COMMANDS
  create        Scaffold a new workspace
  add           Add a project (from the bundled templates)
  templates     List available templates
  env           Secrets / environment-variable backends (get / set / list / pull / switch) — dotenv / infisical
  container     Build and push container images (info / build / push) — Dockerfile-driven
  dev           Start local dev processes (Procfile.dev driven)
  deploy        Deploy per-project workloads (kustomize / S3-compatible / Vercel / Cloudflare / EdgeOne)
  run           Run any command with project .env injected (infisical-run style)
  configure     Configure machine-level endpoint profiles (env / deploy / container, per-backend subtree)
  serve         Launch the local web UI to edit configuration (127.0.0.1; credentials never seen by AI)
  skills        Manage the one CLI's bundled skills installation (skills install)

COMMON FLAGS
  -o, --output  Output format: json | yaml | text (default auto: human format on a TTY, JSON on a pipe)
  -h, --help    Show this help
  -v, --version Show version

EXAMPLES
  one create my-app                                                # Scaffold a workspace (defaults to dotenv)
  one add nestjs-api --name user-api                               # Add a NestJS backend project
  one configure add container/ghcr --profile ghcr --use            # Register a GHCR profile
  one configure add deploy/kustomize --profile prod-k8s --use      # Register a Kubernetes profile
  one container build user-api                                     # Build the project's registry-tagged image
  one container push user-api                                      # Push the built image
  one deploy                                                       # Auto build / push / kubectl apply
  one dev                                                          # Start every dev process
  one env pull                                                     # Pull secrets from Infisical into .env

For per-command help: one <command> --help
add.short: Add a project (from the bundled templates)
deploy.short: Deploy per-project workloads (kustomize / aws-s3 / aliyun-oss / vercel / ...)
dev.short: Local dev orchestration (start the processes in Procfile.dev)
run.short: Inject project secrets and run any command (infisical-run style)
serve.short: Launch a local web UI to edit profiles (127.0.0.1, with sensitive credentials)
skills.short: Manage the one CLI's bundled skills installation on this machine
configure.locale.short: Show or set the display language (auto / zh-CN / en-US)
